query: SELECT up.userId, u.name, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.sectorFocus, up.salesMotion FROM userProfiles up JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Leo%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT up.userId, u.name, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.sectorFocus, up.salesMotion FROM userProfiles up JOIN users u ON u.id = up.userId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Leo%'
